channel.description: Latest marine jobs for Deck Ratings
channel.title: Maritime Union - Job for Mariners

item.title: [Gold Job] ORDINARY SEAMAN FOR LNG/LPG VESSEL at
[Gold Job] Requirement For Oil/Chem Tanker at

item.description:
Location: Netherlands
Description:

📍 Location: Netherlands and Belgium – different projects
📅 Start Date: different start dates
📄 Contract: Dutch/Belgium temporary agency contract
⏳ Hours: 40 hrs/week guaranteed + possible overtime

💡 Your Tasks:

✅ Cable duct assembly (Unistrut)
✅ Dismantling steel structures when no longer needed or for relocation/replacement
✅ Securing steel components with bolts, rivets, or welding
✅ Installing metal floor & roof decking, securing flooring panels
✅ Protective tube assembly
✅ Assembling small iron constructions (stairs, fences)

🔥 What We Offer:

🏠 Free housing (single room in shared apartment)
🚗 Company car provided (or km allowance if using own car)
✈️ First & last flight paid (rotation travel at worker’s expense)
💰 Weekly salary payments
🩺 Health insurance arranged by Wanted and deducted from your growth salary
🔄 Preferred rotation: 6 weeks work / 2 weeks home (flexible)

🦺 Bring your own safety shoes (S3 over ankle), other PPE provided by Wanted, if needed

🔎 Requirements:

✔️ Conversational English required
✔️ VCA & BSN (We can help you obtain them if needed)
✔️ Driving license (Advantage)

✔️ Familiarity with different types of industrial coatings, including epoxy, polyurethane, and powder coatings.

✔️ Ability to read blueprints, work orders, and technical specifications.

✔️ Knowledge of surface preparation techniques and painting methods.

📩 Interested? Apply now!

Countries: Belgium Netherlands

Languages: English



Apply to this job
item.title: [Hot Job] Industrial Painters at WANTED Spijkenisse

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Quick Joining — May 18/19 | Short Contract Until ~May 26

Jump onboard a new and modern live fish carrier for a fast, hands-on assignment in UK waters. This is a rare chance to break into aquaculture shipping — one of the fastest-growing niches in the maritime industry.

What You Will Do:

  • Assist with deck operations and daily onboard routines

  • Support cargo handling and vessel maintenance

  • Work alongside a compact, professional crew on a state-of-the-art vessel

What You Need:

  • Valid STCW Basic Safety Training and seafarer's medical

  • UK entry eligibility — valid visa, British passport, or permanent residency

  • Valid passport with sufficient validity

  • Willingness to join immediately (May 18/19)

  • No aquaculture experience required — we value attitude and readiness

Why This Assignment:

  • Short trip, real experience — build your sea time on a specialized vessel

  • Modern vessel — work with latest aquaculture technology, not rust and breakdowns

  • Gateway to aquaculture sector — live fish carriers are in high demand, and this entry opens doors

Apply now with CV and certificates. Positions fill fast on short-notice assignments.



Apply to this job
item.title: [Hot Job] Ordinary Seaman (OS) — Modern Live Fish Carrier | Short Trip | UK Waters at OffshoreCrew AS

item.description:
Location:
Description:

AB to join a Jack Up vessel in the UK on the 3rd of May for 4 weeks.

You must have UK working rights.

Requirements:

  • AB COC
  • STCW
  • GWO WAH
  • GWO SS
  • Passport
  • BOSIET/FOET
  • Seaman’s Book
  • Medical

If interested and available, please send your CV to the provided email.



Apply to this job

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Position available for an Able Seaman (AB) for wind activities. Visa requirement: B-1 for transit or travel to the OCS. Note that this role is for wind activities only, not OCS activities.

Contract: Polish

Duration: 6 weeks on / 6 weeks off

If interested and available, please send your CV to…



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Able Seaman (AB) for Wind Activities – B-1 Visa Required at Transport and Offshore Services

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Positions available for Able Seamen (AB) on different types of vessels, including a dredging vessel and a heavy lift vessel. Immediate start required with contract durations of 4-5 weeks. Specific certifications such as GWO SS & WAH, BOSIET CA-EBS are required for the heavy lift vessel position.

If interested and available, please send your CV to the provided email.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Able Seaman Positions Available on Various Vessels – Immediate Start at Select Offshore

item.description:
Location:
Description:

OOL is looking for an Able-Bodied Seaman (AB) to join a Multicat vessel in the UK.

Details:

  • Vessel: Multicat
  • Duration: 4 weeks
  • Joining location: Portland
  • Rate: £215 per day
  • Scope of work: M.O.D work

Requirements:

  • UK nationals only
  • AB CoC
  • Valid ENG 1
  • All valid STCW certificates

If interested and available, please send your CV to…



Apply to this job
